description: Base terrain types painted as hex fill on the map.
terrain: Vast, wind-churned waters stretching beyond sight, hiding depth and danger beneath every swell.
Sheer grey peaks jutting above the treeline, capped with snow year-round and wrapped in cloud.
Waterlogged ground of black muck and sour reeds, where a wrong step swallows a boot whole.
Rolling open country of waist-high grass bending under a constant wind beneath an enormous sky.
Dense, living canopy that swallows light and sound, the air thick with moss and birdsong.
A vast sweep of sun-scorched sand and cracked rock where shade is scarce and mercy scarcer.
Gentle, undulating slopes of grass and scattered stone, offering long views from every crest.
